/usr/bin/g++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/opencraft.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/opencraft.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opencraft.dir/src/Core/Engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opencraft.dir/src/WindowManager/WindowManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opencraft.dir/lib/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opencraft.dir/lib/imgui/imgui_demo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opencraft.dir/lib/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opencraft.dir/lib/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opencraft.dir/lib/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opencraft.dir/lib/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opencraft.dir/lib/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o -o opencraft  lib/glfw/src/libglfw3.a /usr/lib/librt.a -lm -ldl /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so
